codes.summary: API key or secret is invalid
codes.developerAction: Verify X-Fluide-Api-Key and X-Fluide-Api-Secret headers

codes.summary: Email address has not been verified
codes.developerAction: Complete email verification before accessing this resource

codes.summary: Generic HTTP error without a domain code
codes.developerAction: Read `message` and `code`; fix request or permissions

codes.summary: Unexpected server error
codes.developerAction: Retry with backoff; contact support with timestamp and request details

codes.summary: Email or password is incorrect
codes.developerAction: Verify credentials or reset the password

codes.summary: User is not a member of the requested organization
codes.developerAction: Use an account with membership in the target organization

codes.summary: Pending token required to complete multi-step auth
codes.developerAction: Restart the sign-in flow from the password step

codes.summary: Two-factor sign-in challenge has expired
codes.developerAction: Sign in again with email and password

codes.summary: Request body or query parameters failed validation
codes.developerAction: Fix the fields listed in `errors` and retry

codes.summary: Bill not found
codes.developerAction: Verify the bill ID belongs to the active company

codes.summary: Unexpected server error
codes.developerAction: Retry with backoff; contact support with timestamp and request details

codes.summary: Invoice not found
codes.developerAction: Verify the invoice ID belongs to the active company

codes.summary: Journal entry debits and credits do not balance
codes.developerAction: Adjust line amounts so total debits equal total credits

codes.summary: Journal entry not found
codes.developerAction: Verify the journal entry ID and company scope

codes.summary: Request body or query parameters failed validation
codes.developerAction: Fix the fields listed in `errors` and retry

codes.summary: Attendance query has an invalid from/to date range
codes.developerAction: Use inclusive YYYY-MM-DD dates with from on or before to

codes.summary: Company context missing from session
codes.developerAction: Set X-Company-Id or select a company in the gateway session

codes.summary: Invalid or expired X-User-Object payload
codes.developerAction: Re-authenticate and retry with a fresh JWT

codes.summary: Missing X-User-Object gateway header
codes.developerAction: Call through the Fluide API gateway with a valid session

codes.summary: Unexpected server error
codes.developerAction: Retry with backoff; contact support with timestamp and request details

codes.summary: HR user record not found
codes.developerAction: Verify the employee or user ID exists in the tenant

codes.summary: Request body or query parameters failed validation
codes.developerAction: Fix the fields listed in `errors` and retry

codes.summary: Unexpected server error
codes.developerAction: Retry with backoff; contact support with timestamp and request details

codes.summary: Payment record not found
codes.developerAction: Verify the payment ID and merchant context

codes.summary: Upstream payment provider returned an error
codes.developerAction: Retry with backoff; check provider status and credentials

codes.summary: Request body or query parameters failed validation
codes.developerAction: Fix the fields listed in `errors` and retry

codes.summary: Wallet balance too low for the requested operation
codes.developerAction: Fund the wallet or reduce the transaction amount

codes.summary: Unexpected server error
codes.developerAction: Retry with backoff; contact support with timestamp and request details

codes.summary: Payroll run cannot be modified in its current status
codes.developerAction: Check run status; create a new run or use the allowed transition

codes.summary: Payroll run not found
codes.developerAction: Verify the payroll run ID and company scope

codes.summary: Payroll settings not configured for the company
codes.developerAction: Configure payroll settings before creating runs

codes.summary: Request body or query parameters failed validation
codes.developerAction: Fix the fields listed in `errors` and retry
